ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 使用已配置的记忆模型

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: In the AWS console, open Bedrock in your preferred region and request access to the model families you need on the model access page. Approval is usually instant for the common foundation models.
ast.target: 在 AWS 控制台中，打开您首选区域的 Bedrock，并在模型访问页面请求访问您需要的模型系列。对于常见的基础模型，批准通常是即时的。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Pick an authentication method. The Bedrock API key is a single bearer token copied once from the Bedrock console. The IAM access key + secret is the classic flow if you already have one set up.
ast.target: 选择一种认证方式。Bedrock API 密钥是一个单一的承载令牌，从 Bedrock 控制台复制一次即可。IAM 访问密钥 + 密钥是经典流程，如果您已经设置好。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Pick the region that hosts your access. For the EU, the Frankfurt region is the common choice.
ast.target: 选择托管您访问权限的区域。对于欧盟，法兰克福区域是常见选择。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Pick a model from the quick pick dropdown. The EU cross-region inference profiles work from any EU region, and the US profiles cover US regions.
ast.target: 从快速选择下拉菜单中选择一个模型。欧盟跨区域推理配置文件适用于任何欧盟区域，而美国配置文件覆盖美国区域。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The chat history folder setting has been retired. Conversations are now stored in the plugin sidebar history panel only. You no longer need a separate JSON-export folder inside the vault.
ast.target: 聊天历史文件夹设置已弃用。对话现在仅存储在插件侧边栏的历史面板中。您不再需要在保险库中设置单独的 JSON 导出文件夹。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The old folder is left in place. Delete it manually inside your vault if you no longer need the JSON conversation exports.
ast.target: 旧文件夹已保留。如果您不再需要 JSON 对话导出，请在保险库中手动删除它。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Pick one in Settings -> Providers before sending a message.
ast.target: 请在发送消息前，在“设置 -> 提供商”中选择一个。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Daily snapshot of Memory v2 health metrics. Copy the JSON and paste it into the agent chat for trend analysis.
ast.target: 记忆 v2 健康指标的每日快照。复制 JSON 并将其粘贴到代理聊天中以进行趋势分析。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This release replaces the original memory subsystem with a faster, more capable engine. We need to upgrade your existing memory in one short cascade. Steps run automatically:
ast.target: 此版本用更快、更强大的引擎替换了原有的记忆子系统。我们需要通过一个简短的级联过程来升级您现有的记忆。步骤将自动运行：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Originals are copied into memory-v1-backup/{timestamp}/ before any change. Backups stay accessible under Settings → Advanced → Backups. New installs never see this dialog; they ship on the new engine from minute one.
ast.target: 在任何更改之前，原始文件将被复制到 memory-v1-backup/{timestamp}/ 中。备份可在“设置 → 高级 → 备份”下访问。新安装不会看到此对话框；它们从一开始就使用新引擎。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You can run this upgrade later from
ast.target: 您可以稍后从以下位置运行此升级

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Not working? Make sure Obsidian is running and the toggle above is enabled. The connector URL does not change between restarts.
ast.target: 无法工作？请确保 Obsidian 正在运行且上方的开关已启用。连接器 URL 在重启之间不会改变。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Scroll to the bottom and click "Create Custom Token". Add two permissions: Account / Workers Scripts / Edit and Account / Account Settings / Read. Under "Account Resources", select "All accounts". Remove "Zone Resources".
ast.target: 滚动到底部并点击“创建自定义令牌”。添加两个权限：Account / Workers Scripts / Edit 和 Account / Account Settings / Read。在“账户资源”下，选择“所有账户”。移除“区域资源”。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: A short cascade brings your existing Vault Operator memory onto the new engine: atomise legacy memory files, seed topic centroids, refresh defaults. Originals are copied to memory-v1-backup/{timestamp}/ before any change.
ast.target: 一个简短的级联过程将把您现有的 Vault Operator 记忆迁移到新引擎：原子化遗留记忆文件，初始化主题聚类中心，刷新默认值。在任何更改之前，原始文件将被复制到 memory-v1-backup/{timestamp}/ 中。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You chose "Later" in the announcement. The upgrade is a one-time event; once it runs, this section disappears.
ast.target: 您在公告中选择了“稍后”。升级是一次性事件；一旦运行，此部分将消失。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes the source, note and meeting-note templates into the folder above. Existing files are skipped.
ast.target: 将源、笔记和会议笔记模板写入上述文件夹。已存在的文件将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian must be running for the connection to work.
ast.target: Obsidian 必须正在运行才能建立连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes the connection config for your desktop client. Restart the client after.
ast.target: 为您的桌面客户端写入连接配置。之后请重启客户端。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to a relay server so AI assistants on any device can reach your vault.
ast.target: 连接到中继服务器，以便任何设备上的 AI 助手都能访问您的保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this URL in your AI assistant. It includes the auth token. Do not share it.
ast.target: 在您的 AI 助手中使用此 URL。它包含认证令牌。请勿分享。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Push the latest relay code to your account. The connector URL stays the same.
ast.target: 将最新的中继代码推送到您的账户。连接器 URL 保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove the relay configuration. You will need to update the connector URL in your AI assistant after redeploying.
ast.target: 移除中继配置。重新部署后，您需要更新 AI 助手中的连接器 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste the token you created in step 2 above.
ast.target: 粘贴您在上面步骤 2 中创建的令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Deploys the relay to your account. Takes about 10 seconds.
ast.target: 将中继部署到您的账户。大约需要 10 秒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where generated files (xlsx, docx, pptx, drawio, excalidraw) land when the agent provides only a filename without a path. Use a trailing slash, e.g. "Inbox/".
ast.target: 当代理仅提供文件名而未指定路径时，生成的文件（xlsx、docx、pptx、drawio、excalidraw）将存放在此文件夹。请使用尾部斜杠，例如 \"Inbox/\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Activate the migration. After activation, reload the plugin (Cmd-P / Ctrl-P -> Reload Vault Operator). The migration runs on the next plugin start. A backup snapshot is written first into the Obsidian plugin data directory, outside the vault tree.
ast.target: 激活迁移。激活后，请重新加载插件（Cmd-P / Ctrl-P -> 重新加载保险库操作器）。迁移将在下次插件启动时运行。首先会在 Obsidian 插件数据目录（保险库树之外）写入一个备份快照。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the semantic index generates a short summary for each note that does not already have one in its frontmatter. Existing summaries are reused and never overwritten. Costs one LLM call per note (uses your default model).
ast.target: 启用后，语义索引会为每个尚未在其 frontmatter 中拥有摘要的笔记生成一个简短摘要。现有摘要会被重用且永不覆盖。每个笔记消耗一次 LLM 调用（使用您的默认模型）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompt template used to generate note summaries. Editable per vault. "Reset" restores the built-in default.
ast.target: 用于生成笔记摘要的提示模板。可按保险库编辑。\"重置\" 将恢复内置默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Triage starts automatically when a note carries the property and value configured below. Default off.
ast.target: 当笔记携带下面配置的属性和值时，分诊会自动开始。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the frontmatter property to watch, for example category.
ast.target: 要监视的 frontmatter 属性名称，例如 category。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Value that triggers a match, for example source. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 触发匹配的值，例如 source。多个值用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a toast when auto-trigger fires. Default off (the vault health modal already lists triggered notes).
ast.target: 自动触发时显示通知。默认关闭（保险库健康模态框已列出触发的笔记）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Page-refs (default): PDF stays in the vault, citations use [[file.pdf#page=N]]. Markdown-mirror (opt-in): an additional markdown copy is created for block-level granularity. Useful for text-heavy PDFs where you want quote-level references.
ast.target: 页面引用（默认）：PDF 保留在保险库中，引用使用 [[file.pdf#page=N]]。Markdown 镜像（可选）：为块级粒度创建额外的 Markdown 副本。适用于文本密集型 PDF，便于引用级别引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter template used by the quick single-pass ingest skill.
ast.target: 快速单次摄取技能使用的 frontmatter 模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter template used by the multi-turn deep-ingest skill.
ast.target: 多轮深度摄取技能使用的 frontmatter 模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter template used by the meeting-transcript summary skill.
ast.target: 会议转录摘要技能使用的 frontmatter 模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter template used for the secondary output notes (sense-making summary or per-takeaway zettels) produced by /ingest and /ingest-deep.
ast.target: 由 /ingest 和 /ingest-deep 产生的二级输出笔记（意义构建摘要或每个要点的卡片盒）所使用的 frontmatter 模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-writes the bundled source, note and meeting-note templates into your configured templates folder. Existing files are skipped unless you confirm overwrite.
ast.target: 将捆绑的源、笔记和会议笔记模板重新写入您配置的模板文件夹。已存在的文件将被跳过，除非您确认覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The top-hub block can only be enabled after this confirmation.
ast.target: 只有在此确认后才能启用顶部中心块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default off. Requires the privacy notice to be accepted first.
ast.target: 默认关闭。需要先接受隐私声明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows subtle notices when you open or edit a note in a cluster that has not been refreshed in a while.
ast.target: 当您打开或编辑一个长时间未刷新的集群中的笔记时，会显示微妙的通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hint fires when the cluster's freshness score drops below this value (0..100). Default 70.
ast.target: 当集群的新鲜度分数低于此值（0..100）时触发提示。默认 70。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default 30. Prevents hints right after the periodic freshness lint already ran.
ast.target: 默认 30。防止在定期新鲜度检查刚运行后立即出现提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default 7. At most one hint per cluster within this period.
ast.target: 默认 7。在此期间内，每个集群最多触发一次提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default 5. Caps total hints on busy days to avoid notice spam.
ast.target: 默认 5。在繁忙的日子限制总提示数，避免通知泛滥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Iterates over all Markdown notes and adds missing frontmatter summaries. Requires the auto-summary toggle above to be enabled. Can take a while on large vaults.
ast.target: 遍历所有 Markdown 笔记并添加缺失的 frontmatter 摘要。需要启用上面的自动摘要开关。在大型保险库上可能需要一些时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scans all notes that match the auto-trigger property and queues them as pending in the triage log.
ast.target: 扫描所有匹配自动触发属性的笔记，并将它们作为待处理项加入分诊日志队列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A map-of-content is a hub note that lists related notes. This action inserts the auto-generated marker block into all hub-candidate notes whose name matches a known cluster. Idempotent (safe to re-run).
ast.target: 内容地图是一个列出相关笔记的中心笔记。此操作将自动生成的标记块插入到所有名称匹配已知集群的中心候选笔记中。幂等操作（可安全重复运行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Updates the auto-generated marker blocks inside hub pages. User-edited blocks are skipped.
ast.target: 更新中心页面内的自动生成标记块。用户编辑过的块将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually rebuild the cached system-prompt block listing your top hubs. Otherwise it only refreshes when hub membership changes (with a 24h cooldown).
ast.target: 手动重建列出您顶级中心的缓存系统提示块。否则，它只在中心成员关系发生变化时刷新（有 24 小时冷却期）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default off. Backups run 60 seconds after plugin boot, then once per 24h.
ast.target: 默认关闭。备份在插件启动 60 秒后运行，之后每 24 小时运行一次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of auto-backups to keep. Older ones are pruned on the next run.
ast.target: 要保留的自动备份数量。较旧的备份将在下次运行时被清理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reads memory/soul.md and adds each bullet under Identity / Values / Anti-Patterns / Communication into Vault Operator’s soul. Idempotent.
ast.target: 读取 memory/soul.md 并将身份 / 价值观 / 反模式 / 沟通下的每个要点添加到保险库操作器的灵魂中。幂等操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to providers whose per-source override below is set to use the default.
ast.target: 应用于其下方每源覆盖设置为使用默认值的提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on (default), save_conversation calls from the same source within 30 minutes append to the existing conversation instead of starting a new one. Memory extraction then runs incrementally on the new turns. Turn off if you want every save_conversation call to create a fresh conversation.
ast.target: 开启时（默认），来自同一源在 30 分钟内的 save_conversation 调用会追加到现有对话，而不是开始新对话。然后，记忆提取会在新轮次上增量运行。如果您希望每次 save_conversation 调用都创建一个新对话，请关闭此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for the atomise-legacy-memory step. Haiku 4.5 is sufficient for typical memory MDs; Sonnet 4.6 if the source has dense compound prose. Defaults to your Memory Model.
ast.target: 用于原子化遗留记忆步骤。Haiku 4.5 对于典型的记忆 MD 文件已足够；如果源材料是密集的复合散文，则使用 Sonnet 4.6。默认使用您的记忆模型。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 一次性运行完整的升级级联。在任何更改之前都会写入备份。成功运行后此部分会消失；备份可在 设置 → 高级 → 备份 中访问。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 当未设置每插件覆盖时应用。硬性上限 300000（5 分钟）。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 插件 ID 和超时时间（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 当一个动态发现的方法被批准足够多次，且其名称看起来像是读取操作（get、list、find、query 等）时，将其添加到用户安全列表中，以便未来的调用被自动批准。

ast.target: v2.5.1 版本部分支持保险库外的文件夹：路径将被保存，但插件技能、临时结果和本地知识数据库将继续存放在您保险库内的默认 `.obsidian-agent` 文件夹中。完整的跨保险库支持已在计划中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Storage layout migration already completed. Nothing to do.
ast.target: 存储布局迁移已完成。无需操作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Migration activated. Please reload the plugin via the command palette to apply.
ast.target: 迁移已激活。请通过命令面板重新加载插件以应用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto-trigger enabled. Reload the plugin so the file watcher registers.
ast.target: 自动触发已启用。请重新加载插件以使文件监视器注册。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please accept the privacy notice first.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 顶部枢纽生成器不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Layout migration is not complete; nothing to restore.
ast.target: 布局迁移未完成；无可恢复内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot resolve vault base path; restore aborted.
ast.target: 无法解析保险库基础路径；恢复已中止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No backup snapshot found. Restore is only available after a fresh migration.
ast.target: 未找到备份快照。恢复仅在全新迁移后可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Layout restored from backup. Reload the plugin via the command palette to pick up the old layout.
ast.target: 布局已从备份恢复。请通过命令面板重新加载插件以加载旧布局。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Nothing to do: old and new path are the same.
ast.target: 无需操作：新旧路径相同。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Nothing migrated. Destination already had identical files.
ast.target: 未迁移任何内容。目标位置已存在相同文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No templates folder set. Enable the Obsidian core templates plugin and pick a folder first.
ast.target: 未设置模板文件夹。请先启用 Obsidian 核心模板插件并选择一个文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory upgrade: memory database, file adapter, or embedding service not ready
ast.target: 内存升级：内存数据库、文件适配器或嵌入服务未就绪

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault Operator upgrade: no API handler available for the atomiser step. Pick a model in the dropdown above or under Settings → Memory → Memory Model.
ast.target: 保险库操作员升级：原子化步骤无可用 API 处理程序。请在上方下拉菜单或“设置 → 内存 → 内存模型”中选择一个模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 保险库操作员升级运行中...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Storage layout migration starting. This may take 30-60 seconds for a large knowledge index.
ast.target: 存储布局迁移开始。对于大型知识索引，这可能需要 30-60 秒。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Storage layout migration completed (no work to do).
ast.target: 存储布局迁移完成（无需操作）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Memory is disabled. Enable it in settings.
ast.target: 内存已禁用。请在设置中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动的对话可保存。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 对话已排队等待内存提取。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Saving the conversation failed. See console for details.
ast.target: 保存对话失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stores not initialized. Reload the plugin?
ast.target: 存储未初始化。是否重新加载插件？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Backfill started. See progress in the console.
ast.target: 回填已开始。请在控制台查看进度。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Inbox triage: configure an auto-trigger property in settings first.
ast.target: 收件箱分类：请先在设置中配置自动触发属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No clusters known. Build the ontology first.
ast.target: 未知集群。请先构建本体。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Soak report failed -- check console for details.
ast.target: 报告失败 -- 请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Test execution blocked. Enable debug mode in settings first.
ast.target: 测试执行被阻止。请先在设置中启用调试模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tool execution test complete! Check console and vault.
ast.target: 工具执行测试完成！请检查控制台和保险库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tool execution test failed! Check console.
ast.target: 工具执行测试失败！请检查控制台。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Discuss freshness update for this cluster
ast.target: 讨论此集群的新鲜度更新

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 重新扫描磁盘上的技能文件夹

ast.name: body
ast.source: Let external AI assistants (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT Desktop) read and write your vault through Vault Operator. Enable a connector here, then point the assistant at it using the configuration block this tab prints.
ast.target: 让外部 AI 助手（Claude Desktop、Claude Code、ChatGPT Desktop）通过 Vault Operator 读写您的保险库。在此处启用连接器，然后使用此选项卡打印的配置块将助手指向它。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Add MCP servers maintained by others (web search, calendar, GitHub, your own scripts) so the agent can call them as tools. Each server runs as its own process, isolated from Obsidian.
ast.target: 添加由他人维护的 MCP 服务器（网络搜索、日历、GitHub、您自己的脚本），以便代理可以将它们作为工具调用。每个服务器作为独立进程运行，与 Obsidian 隔离。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a Markdown file whose YAML frontmatter is used as the basis for newly ingested source notes. Leave empty to fall back to the bundled defaults. Useful if you want a custom set of frontmatter properties on every new source note.
ast.target: 指向 Markdown 文件的保险库相对路径，其 YAML 前置数据将用作新摄取源笔记的基础。留空则回退到内置默认值。如果您希望每个新源笔记都有一组自定义的前置数据属性，这将非常有用。

ast.name: body
ast.source: One-off operations you can run on the whole vault: backfill missing frontmatter summaries, scan the inbox for auto-trigger matches, inject map-of-content markers into hub notes, or rebuild the cached top-hub block. Each action is idempotent and safe to re-run.
ast.target: 您可以在整个保险库上运行的一次性操作：回填缺失的前置数据摘要、扫描收件箱以查找自动触发匹配项、将内容地图标记注入枢纽笔记，或重建缓存的顶部枢纽块。每个操作都是幂等的，可以安全地重新运行。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Tune call_plugin_api latency limits and let the plugin learn which Tier-2 methods are safe reads.
ast.target: 调整 call_plugin_api 延迟限制，并让插件学习哪些 Tier-2 方法是安全的读取操作。

ast.name: content
ast.source: [System] You executed tools but produced no visible response. You MUST respond to the user. Explain what you did, what happened, and suggest next steps. If a plugin command opens a dialog, tell the user what to do in the dialog.
ast.target: [系统] 您执行了工具但未产生可见响应。您必须回复用户。请解释您做了什么、发生了什么，并建议下一步操作。如果插件命令打开了一个对话框，请告知用户在对话框中该做什么。

ast.name: content
ast.source: [System] Iteration limit reached. Deliver your final answer NOW. Do NOT call any tools.
ast.target: [系统] 已达到迭代上限。请立即给出最终答案。不要调用任何工具。

ast.name: content
ast.source: [Context condensed to save space. Continue the task from here.]
ast.target: [上下文已压缩以节省空间。请从这里继续任务。]

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the complete content of a file. Use this before modifying any file.
ast.target: 读取文件的完整内容。在修改任何文件之前请先使用此工具。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse and extract text from Office/data documents (PPTX, XLSX, DOCX, PDF, JSON, XML, CSV). Returns structured Markdown text.
ast.target: 解析并从 Office/数据文档（PPTX、XLSX、DOCX、PDF、JSON、XML、CSV）中提取文本。返回结构化的 Markdown 文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List files and folders in a directory. Use "/" for the vault root.
ast.target: 列出目录中的文件和文件夹。使用 \"/\" 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for text or regex across files. Returns matching lines with line numbers.
ast.target: 在文件中搜索文本或正则表达式。返回包含行号的匹配行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Overview of the vault — note count, folder structure, top tags, recently modified files. Use when you need a broad picture of the vault that isn't already in the context block.
ast.target: 保险库概览——笔记数量、文件夹结构、热门标签、最近修改的文件。当您需要了解保险库的整体情况（且该信息尚未包含在上下文块中）时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run structural health checks: orphaned notes, missing backlinks, broken links, weak clusters, inconsistent tags. Returns findings with fix suggestions.
ast.target: 运行结构健康检查：孤立笔记、缺失的反向链接、损坏的链接、薄弱的聚类、不一致的标签。返回检查结果及修复建议。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read all YAML frontmatter fields of a note (tags, aliases, dates, status, custom properties).
ast.target: 读取笔记的所有 YAML 前置元数据字段（标签、别名、日期、状态、自定义属性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find all notes with given tags. match="any" (OR, default) or match="all" (AND). Tags with or without # both work.
ast.target: 查找所有具有给定标签的笔记。match=\"any\"（或，默认）或 match=\"all\"（与）。带或不带 # 的标签均可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get forward links and backlinks for a note. direction="both" (default), "forward", or "backlinks".
ast.target: 获取笔记的正向链接和反向链接。direction=\"both\"（默认）、\"forward\" 或 \"backlinks\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the daily note. offset=0 today (default), -1 yesterday, 1 tomorrow. create=true creates it if missing.
ast.target: 读取每日笔记。offset=0 今天（默认），-1 昨天，1 明天。create=true 在笔记缺失时创建它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a note in the Obsidian editor. Use after creating or editing a note to bring it into focus.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 编辑器中打开笔记。在创建或编辑笔记后使用，以将其置于焦点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find notes by meaning (semantic similarity). Returns the most relevant excerpts for a natural-language query. Requires the Semantic Index to be built in Settings.
ast.target: 按含义（语义相似性）查找笔记。为自然语言查询返回最相关的摘录。需要在设置中构建语义索引。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query an Obsidian Bases file and return the notes that match its filter conditions.
ast.target: 查询 Obsidian Bases 文件并返回符合其过滤条件的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new file or completely replace an existing file's content. Use for new files or full rewrites. For PDF/document ingest, use ingest_document instead (it appends the original text automatically).
ast.target: 创建新文件或完全替换现有文件的内容。用于新文件或完全重写。对于 PDF/文档导入，请改用 ingest_document（它会自动附加原始文本）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace a specific string in an existing file. Preferred for targeted edits — preserves surrounding content. old_str must exactly match the file content.
ast.target: 替换现有文件中的特定字符串。适用于有针对性的编辑——保留周围内容。old_str 必须与文件内容完全匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append content to the end of a file. Ideal for daily notes, logs, and additive entries.
ast.target: 将内容追加到文件末尾。适用于每日笔记、日志和增量条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set or update frontmatter fields without touching note content.
ast.target: 设置或更新前置元数据字段，而不影响笔记内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new folder (including parent folders).
ast.target: 创建新文件夹（包括父文件夹）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move a file or empty folder to the trash (safe — recoverable).
ast.target: 将文件或空文件夹移至回收站（安全——可恢复）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move or rename a file or folder.
ast.target: 移动或重命名文件或文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Obsidian Canvas (.canvas) file visualizing notes and their wikilink connections. mode: "folder" | "tag" | "backlinks" | "files".
ast.target: 创建一个 Obsidian Canvas（.canvas）文件，可视化笔记及其维基链接连接。mode: \"folder\" | \"tag\" | \"backlinks\" | \"files\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Excalidraw drawing (.excalidraw.md) with labeled boxes and optional arrows between them. Format is handled automatically — never use write_file for .excalidraw.md files.
ast.target: 创建一个 Excalidraw 绘图（.excalidraw.md），包含带标签的方框和可选的箭头。格式会自动处理——切勿对 .excalidraw.md 文件使用 write_file。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a Draw.io / diagrams.net flowchart (.drawio or .drawio.svg) with labeled nodes and directed arrows. The SVG variant renders in Obsidian and opens editable in the drawio-obsidian or obsidian-diagrams-net plugin. NEVER use write_file for .drawio files — the mxfile wrapper is strict.
ast.target: 创建一个 Draw.io / diagrams.net 流程图（.drawio 或 .drawio.svg），包含带标签的节点和有向箭头。SVG 变体可在 Obsidian 中渲染，并可在 drawio-obsidian 或 obsidian-diagrams-net 插件中打开编辑。切勿对 .drawio 文件使用 write_file——mxfile 包装器是严格的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Obsidian Bases (.base) database view file.
ast.target: 创建一个 Obsidian Bases（.base）数据库视图文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add or replace a view in an existing Bases file.
ast.target: 在现有 Bases 文件中添加或替换视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Plan a presentation from source material and corporate template. Generates a complete deck plan with content for every shape via internal LLM call.
ast.target: 根据源材料和公司模板规划演示文稿。通过内部 LLM 调用生成完整的幻灯片计划，包含每个形状的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a PowerPoint presentation (.pptx) with template-based generation. Supports user templates (.pptx/.potx from vault) or bundled defaults (executive, modern, minimal).
ast.target: 使用基于模板的生成方式创建 PowerPoint 演示文稿（.pptx）。支持用户模板（来自保险库的 .pptx/.potx）或内置默认模板（executive、modern、minimal）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a Word document (.docx) with structured sections, headings, bullets, and tables.
ast.target: 创建包含结构化章节、标题、项目符号和表格的 Word 文档（.docx）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a Markdown source note from a PDF/Office activeDocument. You write the frontmatter + overview, the tool appends the full original text automatically.
ast.target: 从 PDF/Office 活动文档创建 Markdown 源笔记。您编写前置元数据和概述，工具会自动附加完整的原始文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx) with sheets, data rows, headers, and optional formulas.
ast.target: 创建包含工作表、数据行、标题和可选公式的 Excel 电子表格（.xlsx）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch a URL and return its content as Markdown. Use for reading documentation, articles, or any public page. maxLength defaults to 20000 chars; use startIndex to paginate.
ast.target: 获取 URL 并将其内容作为 Markdown 返回。用于阅读文档、文章或任何公共页面。maxLength 默认为 20000 个字符；使用 startIndex 进行分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the web and return titles, URLs, and snippets. Follow up with web_fetch to read a full page. Only available when Web Tools are enabled in settings.
ast.target: 搜索网络并返回标题、URL 和摘要。使用 web_fetch 阅读完整页面。仅当设置中启用了 Web 工具时可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask the user a clarifying question when the request is ambiguous. Provide optional answer choices. Use sparingly — only when genuinely needed.
ast.target: 当请求不明确时，向用户提出澄清性问题。提供可选的答案选项。请谨慎使用——仅在真正需要时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: End the task loop after a multi-step tool workflow. Only use this after tool calls — never for simple text responses. The result is a brief internal log entry (e.g. "Created summary note"), not the user-facing answer.
ast.target: 在多步骤工具工作流后结束任务循环。仅在工具调用后使用——切勿用于简单的文本响应。结果是一个简短的内部日志条目（例如“已创建摘要笔记”），而不是面向用户的答案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Publish your task plan as a visible checklist. Use ONLY for complex tasks with 3+ distinct steps. For simple tasks, execute directly — no plan needed. Format: one item per line with - [ ] (pending), - [~] (in progress), - [x] (done).
ast.target: 将您的任务计划发布为可见的清单。仅用于包含 3 个以上不同步骤的复杂任务。对于简单任务，直接执行——无需计划。格式：每行一项，使用 - [ ]（待处理）、- [~]（进行中）、- [x]（已完成）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawn a sub-agent (default slug "agent" -- the standard Agent). The sub-agent runs with a fresh conversation and returns its result. Use for agentic workflows: prompt chaining, orchestrator-worker, evaluator-optimizer, or routing.
ast.target: 生成一个子代理（默认 slug \"agent\"——标准代理）。子代理在全新的对话中运行并返回其结果。用于代理工作流：提示链、编排器-工作者、评估器-优化器或路由。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Escalate ONE hard synthesis step to a flagship-tier advisor subagent (read-only, 3000-token answer cap, max 3 calls per task). Use when the main loop is stuck on a problem that needs a stronger model.
ast.target: 将一个困难的综合步骤升级到旗舰级顾问子代理（只读，3000 个 token 的答案上限，每个任务最多 3 次调用）。当主循环卡在需要更强模型的问题上时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Load the full step-by-step instructions of a skill listed in the SKILLS directory of your system prompt. Returns the workflow body as a tool result; follow it exactly for the current task.
ast.target: 加载系统提示中 SKILLS 目录下列出的技能的完整分步说明。将工作流主体作为工具结果返回；请严格按照其执行当前任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Execute a JavaScript helper script that lives in a self-authored skill folder under scripts/{script_name}.js. The script must export `async function execute(args)`; the return value is JSON-serialized back to the tool_result. Replaces the legacy code_modules pattern (FEAT-29-06).
ast.target: 执行位于 scripts/{script_name}.js 下的自建技能文件夹中的 JavaScript 辅助脚本。脚本必须导出 `async function execute(args)`；返回值将作为 JSON 序列化回 tool_result。取代了旧的 code_modules 模式（FEAT-29-06）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run another skill as a sub-skill. The sub-skill executes in an isolated subtask (own conversation, own attempt_completion). Its final result is returned as the tool_result. Composition cycles and a max-depth of 5 are enforced.
ast.target: 将另一个技能作为子技能运行。子技能在隔离的子任务中执行（拥有自己的对话，自己的 attempt_completion）。其最终结果作为 tool_result 返回。强制执行组合循环和最大深度 5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Call a tool exposed by a configured MCP server as a first-class step inside a skill workflow. The MCP server's approval policy still applies. Composition cycles and a max-depth of 5 are enforced across skill <-> mcp transitions.
ast.target: 在技能工作流中，将配置的 MCP 服务器公开的工具作为一等步骤调用。MCP 服务器的审批策略仍然适用。在技能 <-> mcp 转换之间强制执行组合循环和最大深度 5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add, remove, update, list, or test MCP servers. Supported transports: SSE, streamable-http (no stdio).
ast.target: 添加、移除、更新、列出或测试 MCP 服务器。支持的传输方式：SSE、streamable-http（不支持 stdio）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage context sources -- persistent text blocks injected into every conversation.
ast.target: 管理上下文源——注入到每次对话中的持久文本块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Live introspection of the running plugin (areas: settings, tools, capabilities, code). Returns a Markdown summary of the actual runtime state -- not guesses.
ast.target: 对正在运行的插件进行实时自省（区域：设置、工具、能力、代码）。返回实际运行时状态的 Markdown 摘要——而非猜测。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change plugin settings programmatically. action="set" with path+value, or action="apply_preset" with a permissive/balanced/restrictive preset. API keys are NOT writable here -- use configure_model.
ast.target: 以编程方式更改插件设置。action=\"set\" 配合 path+value，或 action=\"apply_preset\" 配合 permissive/balanced/restrictive 预设。API 密钥在此不可写——请使用 configure_model。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Call a tool on an MCP server configured in settings.
ast.target: 调用设置中配置的 MCP 服务器上的工具。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full description and a compact input-schema summary of a single MCP tool. Use when the MCP listing shows a truncated description and you need the full text before calling use_mcp_tool.
ast.target: 读取单个 MCP 工具的完整描述和紧凑的输入模式摘要。当 MCP 列表显示截断的描述，并且您需要在调用 use_mcp_tool 之前获取完整文本时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Execute an Obsidian command by its ID. Use this to trigger plugin functionality. Check PLUGIN SKILLS in your context for available commands.
ast.target: 通过ID执行Obsidian命令。用于触发插件功能。请检查上下文中的“插件技能”以获取可用命令。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 要写入文件的完整内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact string to find in the file. Must be unique within the file. Include surrounding context if the string might appear multiple times.
ast.target: 要在文件中查找的确切字符串。在文件中必须是唯一的。如果字符串可能出现多次，请包含周围上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The string to replace old_str with. Can be empty string to delete old_str.
ast.target: 用于替换 old_str 的字符串。可以是空字符串以删除 old_str。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of replacements expected (default: 1). Set to a higher number only if old_str intentionally appears multiple times.
ast.target: 预期的替换次数（默认：1）。仅当 old_str 有意多次出现时才设置为更高数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append content to the end of an existing file. If the file does not exist, it will be created. Use this for adding entries to logs, daily notes, or appending sections to existing notes. For targeted edits within a file, use edit_file instead.
ast.target: 将内容追加到现有文件的末尾。如果文件不存在，将创建它。使用此功能向日志、每日笔记添加条目，或向现有笔记追加部分。对于文件内的定向编辑，请改用 edit_file。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file relative to vault root (e.g., "Daily/2025-01-15.md")
ast.target: 相对于保险库根目录的文件路径（例如“Daily/2025-01-15.md”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content to append to the end of the file.
ast.target: 要追加到文件末尾的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
String to insert between existing content and new content (default: "
"). Use "

" to add a blank line before the appended content.
ast.target: 在现有内容和新内容之间插入的字符串（默认：“\\n”）。使用“\\n\\n”在追加内容前添加一个空行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new folder (directory) in the vault. Creates all intermediate parent folders as needed.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建新文件夹（目录）。根据需要创建所有中间父文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path relative to vault root (e.g., "projects/2024/notes")
ast.target: 相对于保险库根目录的文件夹路径（例如“projects/2024/notes”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move a file or empty folder to the trash (safe delete). The item can be restored from the OS trash or Obsidian trash folder.
ast.target: 将文件或空文件夹移动到回收站（安全删除）。该物品可以从操作系统回收站或Obsidian回收站文件夹中恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file or folder to delete (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 要删除的文件或文件夹的路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move or rename a file or folder to a new path. Can be used to rename a file by keeping the same directory but changing the filename.
ast.target: 将文件或文件夹移动或重命名到新路径。可通过保持目录不变但更改文件名来重命名文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current path of the file or folder (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的当前路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: New path for the file or folder (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的新路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. Restrict the listing to a single task (e.g. "task-1700000000000"). When omitted, the listing covers every task in the shadow repo.
ast.target: 可选。将列表限制为单个任务（例如“task-1700000000000”）。省略时，列表涵盖影子仓库中的每个任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative path filter (e.g. "Notes/Madrid.md"). Only checkpoints that touched this path (filesChanged or newFiles) are returned.
ast.target: 可选的保险库相对路径过滤器（例如“Notes/Madrid.md”）。仅返回涉及此路径（filesChanged 或 newFiles）的检查点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. When true, include full timestamp, full files array, and the newFiles list per entry. Default false renders one compact line per checkpoint.
ast.target: 可选。为true时，包含完整时间戳、完整文件数组和每个条目的 newFiles 列表。默认false为每个检查点渲染一行紧凑信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the snapshot content of a single file from a specific checkpoint. Use this after list_checkpoints to inspect what a note looked like at the point a checkpoint was taken (before the matching write tool ran).
ast.target: 从特定检查点读取单个文件的快照内容。在 list_checkpoints 后使用此功能，以检查笔记在检查点被记录时（在匹配的写入工具运行之前）的样子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Checkpoint commit oid (40-char lowercase hex), from list_checkpoints.
ast.target: 检查点提交oid（40字符小写十六进制），来自 list_checkpoints。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the file to read from the snapshot.
ast.target: 要从快照中读取的文件的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Diff a checkpoint snapshot against the current vault state. Without path: a per-file summary across every file in the checkpoint. With path: a line-level diff for that single file. Use before restore_checkpoint to confirm what would change.
ast.target: 将检查点快照与当前保险库状态进行差异比较。不指定路径：检查点中每个文件的摘要。指定路径：该单个文件的行级差异。在 restore_checkpoint 前使用以确认将发生什么变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative file path. Without it the tool returns the full per-file summary.
ast.target: 可选的保险库相对文件路径。不指定时，工具返回完整的每文件摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative file path to restore. Required when mode is "file" (the default if path is given). Ignored when mode is "task".
ast.target: 要恢复的保险库相对文件路径。当模式为“file”时必需（如果指定了路径则为默认值）。当模式为“task”时忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. "file" restores only `path`. "task" restores every file in the checkpoint AND trashes newFiles. Default is inferred: "file" when path is set, "task" when it is not.
ast.target: 可选。“file”仅恢复 `path`。“task”恢复检查点中的每个文件并删除 newFiles。默认值推断：设置了路径时为“file”，未设置时为“task”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the new Markdown note (e.g. "Notes/Webb-2026_Convergence-Outlook.md")

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frontmatter (YAML) + overview + kernaussagen that you wrote. Must include the opening and closing --- for frontmatter. The full original document text will be appended automatically after a "## Originaltext" heading.
ast.target: 您编写的前置元数据（YAML）+概述+核心要点。必须包含前置元数据的开头和结尾 ---。完整的原始文档文本将在“## Originaltext”标题后自动追加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the source document in the vault (e.g. "Attachements/report.pdf"). Use this for vault files.
ast.target: 保险库中源文档的路径（例如“Attachements/report.pdf”）。用于保险库文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source-URI. Beispiele: "vault://Inbox/Article.md" fuer Vault-Notes, "https://example.com/article" fuer URLs, "file:///path/to.pdf" fuer lokale Files.
ast.target: 来源URI。示例：“vault://Inbox/Article.md”用于保险库笔记，“https://example.com/article”用于URL，“file:///path/to.pdf”用于本地文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: Cluster-Name als Hint. Wenn weggelassen, wird aus Ontologie ermittelt.
ast.target: 可选：集群名称作为提示。省略时，从本体论中确定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: User-Decision, falls schon klar. Default "pending" -> Triage-Karte als Vorschlag, Decision wird spaeter gesetzt.
ast.target: 可选：用户决策，如果已明确。默认“pending” -> 作为建议的分诊卡片，决策稍后设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: explizite Suchquery fuer die Vault/Memory/History-Recherche. Wenn weggelassen, wird sie aus der Source abgeleitet (Basename + Frontmatter-Themen bei Vault-Files, URL-Pfad bei https-Quellen). Eine handverlesene Query produziert deutlich schaerfere Treffer.
ast.target: 可选：用于保险库/记忆/历史研究的显式搜索查询。省略时，从来源推导（保险库文件的基名+前置元数据主题，https来源的URL路径）。手动策划的查询能产生明显更精确的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选：针对搜索源的 Top-K 参数（默认值 5，最大值 10）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: wenn true, wird die Vault/Memory/History-Recherche uebersprungen. Default false. Sinnvoll fuer Auto-Trigger-Pfade die nur klassifizieren wollen.
ast.target: 可选：若设为 true，则跳过 Vault/Memory/History 的检索。默认值为 false。适用于仅需分类的自动触发路径。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 源笔记的 Vault 路径（md 或 pdf 格式）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Empfohlen: "source-only". Die anderen Modi produzieren via naivem Default-Stub Transkript-Splitter -- nicht fuer Sense-Making nutzen.
ast.target: 推荐使用 \"source-only\" 模式。其他模式会通过朴素的默认存根生成转录分割器——不适用于意义构建。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选：聚类提示，否则从本体论中推导。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aktive Web-Suche nach Gegenpositionen zu einem Cluster, der von einer Source-Domain dominiert ist. Blockiert die dominante Domain in der Suche, gibt 5 Top-Treffer aus alternativen Quellen zurueck. Nutzt den konfigurierten Web-Search-Provider (BYOK, ADR-104).
ast.target: 针对被单一来源域主导的聚类，主动进行网络搜索以寻找对立观点。在搜索中屏蔽该主导域，返回来自替代来源的 5 个最佳结果。使用已配置的网络搜索提供商（BYOK，ADR-104）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于反回声传递的聚类名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: konkrete Suchanfrage. Sonst wird aus Cluster-Name abgeleitet.
ast.target: 可选：具体的搜索查询。否则将从聚类名称推导。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mark a Vault note as memory-source. The note's content will be extracted into Memory v2 facts on the next indexer pass (and re-extracted incrementally when the note is edited). Idempotent. Optionally writes `memory-source: true` to the note frontmatter so the marker stays visible.
ast.target: 将 Vault 笔记标记为记忆源。笔记内容将在下一次索引器运行时提取到 Memory v2 事实中（并在笔记编辑时增量重新提取）。幂等操作。可选地将 `memory-source: true` 写入笔记的 frontmatter，以使标记保持可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a markdown note.
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 的 Markdown 笔记路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default true: also write `memory-source: true` to the note frontmatter.
ast.target: 默认为 true：同时将 `memory-source: true` 写入笔记的 frontmatter。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default true: also remove `memory-source` from the note frontmatter.
ast.target: 默认为 true：同时从笔记的 frontmatter 中移除 `memory-source`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all Vault notes registered as memory-source. Read-only. Returns path, marker source (frontmatter / agent-tool / settings-list), dirty flag, fact count, and last-extracted timestamp.
ast.target: 列出所有注册为记忆源的 Vault 笔记。只读。返回路径、标记来源（frontmatter / agent-tool / settings-list）、脏标志、事实计数和最后提取时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, only notes awaiting re-extraction are listed.
ast.target: 若为 true，则仅列出等待重新提取的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的最大结果数（默认值：50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the YAML frontmatter of a note. Returns all metadata fields such as tags, aliases, dates, status, or any custom properties. Use this before update_frontmatter to see current values.
ast.target: 读取笔记的 YAML frontmatter。返回所有元数据字段，如标签、别名、日期、状态或任何自定义属性。在使用 update_frontmatter 前使用此功能查看当前值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the note relative to vault root (e.g., "folder/note.md")
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 根目录的笔记路径（例如 \"folder/note.md\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set or update YAML frontmatter fields in a note. Existing fields not mentioned in updates are preserved. Creates the frontmatter block if the note has none. Use this to set tags, status, dates, aliases, or any custom metadata.
ast.target: 设置或更新笔记中的 YAML frontmatter 字段。未在更新中提及的现有字段将被保留。如果笔记没有 frontmatter 块，则创建一个。用于设置标签、状态、日期、别名或任何自定义元数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the note relative to vault root.
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 根目录的笔记路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Key-value pairs to set. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, or arrays. Example: {"status": "done", "tags": ["project", "active"], "priority": 1}
ast.target: 要设置的键值对。值可以是字符串、数字、布尔值或数组。示例：{\"status\": \"done\", \"tags\": [\"project\", \"active\"], \"priority\": 1}。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional list of frontmatter keys to delete.
ast.target: 可选的要删除的 frontmatter 键列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find all notes that have one or more specific tags. Tags can be specified with or without the # prefix. Use match="all" to require all tags (AND), or match="any" to require at least one (OR, default).
ast.target: 查找所有具有一个或多个特定标签的笔记。标签可以带或不带 # 前缀。使用 match=\"all\" 要求所有标签（AND），或使用 match=\"any\" 要求至少一个（OR，默认）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tags to search for. The # prefix is optional (e.g., ["project", "#active"]).
ast.target: 要搜索的标签。# 前缀是可选的（例如 [\"project\", \"#active\"]）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: "any" = OR match (default), "all" = AND match (note must have every tag).
ast.target: \"any\" = OR 匹配（默认），\"all\" = AND 匹配（笔记必须包含所有标签）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50).
ast.target: 返回的最大结果数（默认值：50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a high-level overview of the vault: total notes, folders, top-level structure, most used tags, and recently modified files. Use this as a first step to understand vault size and organization.
ast.target: 获取 Vault 的高级概览：笔记总数、文件夹数、顶层结构、最常用标签和最近修改的文件。用作了解 Vault 规模和组织的第一步。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Action to perform. "check" (default): run health checks. "fix_backlinks": fix missing backlinks. "cleanup": remove invalid backlinks. "fix_categories": move values from wrong property to correct (e.g. Thema in Konzepte → Themen). "refresh": re-extract graph + ontology before checking.
ast.target: 要执行的操作。\"check\"（默认）：运行健康检查。\"fix_backlinks\"：修复缺失的反向链接。\"cleanup\"：移除无效的反向链接。\"fix_categories\"：将值从错误的属性移动到正确的属性（例如，将 Konzepte 中的 Thema 移至 Themen）。\"refresh\"：在检查前重新提取图谱和本体论。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the forward links (notes this note links to) and backlinks (notes that link to this note) for a given file. Useful for understanding note relationships and navigating the knowledge graph.
ast.target: 获取给定文件的正向链接（此笔记链接到的笔记）和反向链接（链接到此笔记的笔记）。有助于理解笔记关系并导航知识图谱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: "both" (default) = forward links + backlinks, "forward" = only links this note makes, "backlinks" = only notes linking to this note.
ast.target: \"both\"（默认）= 正向链接 + 反向链接，\"forward\" = 仅此笔记创建的链接，\"backlinks\" = 仅链接到此笔记的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open a note in the Obsidian editor so the user can see or edit it. Use this after creating or modifying a note to bring it into focus, or when the user asks to navigate to a specific note.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 编辑器中打开笔记，以便用户查看或编辑。在创建或修改笔记后使用此功能将其置于焦点，或当用户要求导航到特定笔记时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the note relative to vault root (e.g., "folder/note.md").
ast.target: 相对于 Vault 根目录的笔记路径（例如 \"folder/note.md\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open in a new tab/pane (default: false — opens in current pane).
ast.target: 在新标签页/窗格中打开（默认值：false — 在当前窗格中打开）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the daily note for a given day. offset=0 is today (default), offset=-1 is yesterday, offset=1 is tomorrow, etc. Set create=true to create the note if it does not exist yet.
ast.target: 读取给定日期的每日笔记。offset=0 为今天（默认），offset=-1 为昨天，offset=1 为明天，依此类推。设置 create=true 以在笔记不存在时创建它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Day offset from today: 0 = today (default), -1 = yesterday, 1 = tomorrow.
ast.target: 相对于今天的日期偏移量：0 = 今天（默认），-1 = 昨天，1 = 明天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the daily note if it does not exist (default: false).
ast.target: 如果每日笔记不存在则创建它（默认值：false）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Natural-language search query (e.g. "project planning ideas", "morning routine notes")
ast.target: 自然语言搜索查询（例如 \"project planning ideas\", \"morning routine notes\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 8, max: 20)
ast.target: 返回的最大结果数（默认值：8，最大值：20）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict results to notes inside this folder (e.g. "Projects" or "Work/Q1"). Prefix match.
ast.target: 将结果限制在此文件夹内的笔记（例如 \"Projects\" 或 \"Work/Q1\"）。前缀匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only return notes that have ANY of these tags (e.g. ["project", "active"]). Tags with or without # both work.
ast.target: 仅返回具有这些标签中任意一个的笔记（例如 [\"project\", \"active\"]）。标签带或不带 # 均可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only return notes modified on or after this date (ISO format: "2025-01-01").
ast.target: 仅返回在此日期或之后修改的笔记（ISO 格式：\"2025-01-01\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Natural-language query for cosine + keyword search over the fact store.
ast.target: 用于在事实存储上进行余弦相似度 + 关键词搜索的自然语言查询。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大命中数（默认值 5，最大值 15）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, expand each direct hit by 1 hop over fact_edges so neighbours surface too. Default false. Multi-hop walks add ~50ms.
ast.target: 若为 true，则通过 fact_edges 将每个直接命中扩展 1 跳，以便邻居也浮现出来。默认值为 false。多跳遍历会增加约 50 毫秒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict to one fact kind (e.g. "preference" for stable user prefs only).
ast.target: 限制为一种事实类型（例如 \"preference\" 仅用于稳定的用户偏好）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional one-line note about why this was marked. Surfaced in telemetry only.
ast.target: 可选的关于标记原因的单行说明。仅在遥测中显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: value=stable beliefs/preferences, anti_pattern=things to avoid, identity=who you are, communication=style/tone.
ast.target: value=稳定的信念/偏好，anti_pattern=需要避免的事物，identity=你是谁，communication=风格/语气。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The soul entry as a single self-contained statement (max ~120 chars).
ast.target: 灵魂条目，作为单个自包含的陈述（最多约 120 个字符）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Importance 0..1 (default 0.7). Higher = more likely to stay in the prompt cap.
ast.target: 重要性 0..1（默认值 0.7）。越高 = 越有可能保留在提示上限中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional fact_id of an existing soul entry to replace. Old entry is superseded, new one inserted.
ast.target: 可选的现有灵魂条目的 fact_id，用于替换。旧条目被取代，新条目被插入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional one-line context (why this entry was added).
ast.target: 可选的单行上下文（添加此条目的原因）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which slice of the runtime state to inspect.
ast.target: 要检查的运行时状态切片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional sub-topic. Used by area=code (Phase 2). Ignored for other areas.
ast.target: 可选的子主题。由 area=code（第 2 阶段）使用。其他区域忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keyword (or short phrase) to search message text for. Case-insensitive.
ast.target: 在消息文本中搜索的关键词（或短语）。不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大命中数（默认值 10，最大值 30）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict to messages of one role. Most useful: role_filter='user' to find your own past statements.
ast.target: 限制为一种角色的消息。最有用：role_filter='user' 以查找您自己过去的陈述。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional conversationId. Restrict to one conversation.
ast.target: 可选的 conversationId。限制为单个对话。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Obsidian Canvas file (.canvas) visualizing notes and their connections. Use to build knowledge graphs, project maps, or link diagrams.
ast.target: 创建一个 Obsidian Canvas 文件（.canvas），可视化笔记及其连接。用于构建知识图谱、项目地图或链接图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the canvas file (must end with .canvas, e.g. "maps/projects.canvas")
ast.target: Canvas 文件的路径（必须以 .canvas 结尾，例如 \"maps/projects.canvas\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: "folder": all notes in a folder; "tag": all notes with a tag; "backlinks": notes linked to/from a specific note; "files": explicit list of note paths
ast.target: \"folder\"：文件夹中的所有笔记；\"tag\"：具有某个标签的所有笔记；\"backlinks\"：链接到/来自特定笔记的笔记；\"files\"：笔记路径的显式列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path, tag name (without #), or note path — depending on mode. Not needed for "files" mode.
ast.target: 文件夹路径、标签名称（不带 #）或笔记路径——取决于模式。对于 \"files\" 模式不需要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Explicit list of note paths (required for "files" mode).
ast.target: 笔记路径的显式列表（\"files\" 模式必需）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of notes to include (default: 50).
ast.target: 包含的最大笔记数（默认值：50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Draw edges between notes that link to each other (default: true).
ast.target: 在相互链接的笔记之间绘制边（默认值：true）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the drawing file (must end with .excalidraw.md, e.g. "Drawings/overview.excalidraw.md")
ast.target: 绘图文件的路径（必须以 .excalidraw.md 结尾，例如 \"Drawings/overview.excalidraw.md\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional stable id referenced by arrows (e.g. "capture", "review"). Auto-generated if omitted.
ast.target: 可选的稳定 ID，由箭头引用（例如 \"capture\", \"review\"）。如果省略则自动生成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Background color: blue, green, yellow, red, purple, orange, gray, cyan, pink, white, or hex (#a5d8ff). Default: blue.
ast.target: 背景颜色：blue, green, yellow, red, purple, orange, gray, cyan, pink, white 或十六进制（#a5d8ff）。默认值：blue。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 标签下方的可选副文本。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要绘制的框数组（最多 12 个）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source box id (or its array index as a string, e.g. "0").
ast.target: 源框 ID（或其数组索引的字符串形式，例如 \"0\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target box id (or its array index as a string).
ast.target: 目标框 ID（或其数组索引的字符串形式）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional arrows connecting boxes. Reference boxes by their "id" field, or by zero-based array index as a string. Arrows stay attached when the user moves boxes in the Excalidraw editor.
ast.target: 连接框的可选箭头。通过框的 \"id\" 字段或从零开始的数组索引字符串来引用框。当用户在 Excalidraw 编辑器中移动框时，箭头会保持附着。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional title text displayed above the boxes
ast.target: 显示在框上方的可选标题文本。

ast.name: description
ast.target: \"grid\"（2 列，默认）或 \"row\"（单行水平排列）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the diagram file. Must end with .drawio OR .drawio.svg (e.g. "Diagrams/workflow.drawio.svg").
ast.target: 图表文件的路径。必须以 .drawio 或 .drawio.svg 结尾（例如 \"Diagrams/workflow.drawio.svg\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: blue, green, yellow, red, purple, orange, gray, cyan, white, or #hex. Default: blue.
ast.target: blue, green, yellow, red, purple, orange, gray, cyan, white 或 #hex。默认值：blue。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 流程图中的框（最多 30 个）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the presentation file (must end with .pptx)
ast.target: 演示文稿文件的路径（必须以 .pptx 结尾）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 副标题（仅用于标题/章节幻灯片）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 幻灯片数组（最多 50 张）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a Word document (.docx) with structured sections containing headings, paragraphs, bullet lists, numbered lists, and tables. The file format is handled automatically -- never use write_file or evaluate_expression for .docx files.
ast.target: 创建一个包含结构化章节（标题、段落、项目符号列表、编号列表和表格）的Word文档（.docx）。文件格式会自动处理——请勿对.docx文件使用write_file或evaluate_expression。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the document file (must end with .docx, e.g. "Documents/report.docx")
ast.target: 文档文件的路径（必须以.docx结尾，例如 \"Documents/report.docx\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Body text (paragraphs separated by blank lines)
ast.target: 正文文本（段落之间用空行分隔）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Document title (displayed as cover heading and in metadata)
ast.target: 文档标题（显示为封面标题和元数据）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Primary color as hex (e.g. "#2B579A"). Default: Word blue.
ast.target: 主色十六进制值（例如 \"#2B579A\"）。默认：Word蓝色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx) with sheets, headers, data rows, and optional formulas. The file format is handled automatically -- never use write_file or evaluate_expression for .xlsx files.
ast.target: 创建一个包含工作表、标题、数据行和可选公式的Excel电子表格（.xlsx）。文件格式会自动处理——请勿对.xlsx文件使用write_file或evaluate_expression。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the spreadsheet file (must end with .xlsx, e.g. "Data/budget.xlsx")
ast.target: 电子表格文件的路径（必须以.xlsx结尾，例如 \"Data/budget.xlsx\"）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的列宽（以字符为单位）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要创建的工作表数组（最多20个）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Title slide with main title and subtitle
ast.target: 包含主标题和副标题的标题幻灯片

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault path to the source note, or direct text content if no note exists.
ast.target: 源笔记的保险库路径，如果笔记不存在则为直接文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Theme name (e.g. "enbw"). Must be an ingested corporate template.
ast.target: 主题名称（例如 \"enbw\"）。必须是已导入的企业模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Speaker deck (max 25 words/slide, notes carry detail) or Reading deck (max 170 words/slide, self-explanatory).
ast.target: 演讲者演示文稿（每张幻灯片最多25个词，备注承载细节）或阅读演示文稿（每张幻灯片最多170个词，自解释）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What should the audience learn, decide, or do?
ast.target: 观众应该学习、决定或做什么？

ast.name: description
ast.source: Who is the target audience? What do they already know?
ast.target: 目标受众是谁？他们已经知道什么？

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target number of slides (optional, auto-determined if omitted).
ast.target: 目标幻灯片数量（可选，如果省略则自动确定）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File path for the base (must end with .base, e.g. "Projects.base")
ast.target: 基础文件的路径（必须以.base结尾，例如 \"Projects.base\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display name for the first view (e.g. "All Projects")
ast.target: 第一个视图的显示名称（例如 \"All Projects\"）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要过滤的前置属性（例如 \"Kategorie\", \"Status\", \"tags\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Values the filter property must match (uses containsAny logic)
ast.target: 过滤属性必须匹配的值（使用containsAny逻辑）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Column names to show in the table (e.g. ["file.name", "Status", "Tags"]). file.name is always first.
ast.target: 要在表格中显示的列名（例如 [\"file.name\", \"Status\", \"Tags\"]）。file.name始终排在第一位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes whose name contains "Template" (default: true)
ast.target: 排除名称包含 \"Template\" 的笔记（默认：true）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a new view to an existing Obsidian Bases file, or replace a view with a new configuration.
ast.target: 向现有的Obsidian Bases文件添加新视图，或用新配置替换视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name for the new view (if a view with this name exists, it is replaced)
ast.target: 新视图的名称（如果存在同名视图，则替换）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Values the filter property must match
ast.target: 过滤属性必须匹配的值

ast.name: description
ast.source: Column names to show in the table
ast.target: 要在表格中显示的列名

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query an Obsidian Bases file and return the notes that match its filter. Returns note paths and key frontmatter properties.
ast.target: 查询Obsidian Bases文件并返回匹配其过滤器的笔记。返回笔记路径和关键前置属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the .base file to query

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the view to use (defaults to first view)
ast.target: 要使用的视图名称（默认为第一个视图）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数（默认：20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch a URL and return its content as readable text. Use for reading documentation, articles, APIs, or any public webpage. HTML is automatically converted to Markdown.
ast.target: 获取URL并将其内容作为可读文本返回。用于阅读文档、文章、API或任何公共网页。HTML会自动转换为Markdown。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://).
ast.target: 要获取的URL（必须以http://或https://开头）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum characters to return (default: 20000). Large pages are truncated.
ast.target: 要返回的最大字符数（默认：20000）。大型页面会被截断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start reading from this character offset (default: 0). Use with maxLength to paginate large pages.
ast.target: 从此字符偏移量开始读取（默认：0）。与maxLength一起使用以对大型页面进行分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the web for current information. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets. Use web_fetch to read the full content of a result.
ast.target: 搜索网络以获取当前信息。返回标题、URL和摘要。使用web_fetch读取结果的完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 10).
ast.target: 要返回的结果数量（默认：5，最大：10）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask the user a clarifying question when the request is genuinely ambiguous and you cannot proceed without a decision. Do NOT use this for suggesting follow-up actions — use the [followups] text block instead. Do NOT use this if you already have enough information to answer — proceed directly.
ast.target: 当请求确实存在歧义且没有决定就无法继续时，向用户提出澄清问题。请勿将此用于建议后续操作——请改用[followups]文本块。如果您已有足够的信息来回答，请直接继续。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The specific question to ask the user.
ast.target: 要向用户提出的具体问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional list of suggested answers. If provided, the user can click one or type their own answer.
ast.target: 可选的建议答案列表。如果提供，用户可以点击一个或输入自己的答案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, the user can select multiple options (checkboxes). The answer will be a comma-separated list.
ast.target: 如果为true，用户可以选择多个选项（复选框）。答案将以逗号分隔的列表形式返回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief internal log entry (e.g. "Created summary note" or "Edited 3 files"). This is never shown to the user.
ast.target: 简短的内部日志条目（例如 \"已创建摘要笔记\" 或 \"已编辑3个文件\"）。这永远不会显示给用户。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Markdown checklist. Each line must start with "- [ ]", "- [~]", or "- [x]". Example:
- [x] Read existing notes
- [~] Create summary
- [ ] Add tags
ast.target:
Markdown检查清单。每行必须以 "- [ ]", "- [~]" 或 "- [x]" 开头。示例：
- [x] 阅读现有笔记
- [~] 创建摘要
- [ ] 添加标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: The slug of the agent to switch to.
ast.target: 要切换到的代理的标识符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief explanation of why you are switching agents.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sub-agent slug. Use "agent" for the default Agent (full capabilities). With profile="research", mode is ignored and the profile runs read-only.
ast.target: 子代理标识符。使用 \"agent\" 表示默认代理（完整功能）。当profile=\"research\"时，模式被忽略，配置文件以只读方式运行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The task description for the sub-agent. Include all context needed -- the sub-agent cannot see the current conversation.
ast.target: 子代理的任务描述。包含所有需要的上下文——子代理无法看到当前对话。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. Pick a subagent profile for the lean path. With "research", the sub-agent gets a read-only tool allowlist and a short focused system prompt, and the Tier-4 justification is not required.
ast.target: 可选。为精简路径选择一个子代理配置文件。使用 \"research\" 时，子代理获得只读工具允许列表和简短聚焦的系统提示，并且不需要四级论证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required when no `profile` is set. One of PARALLEL, SPECIALIST, ESCALATION. Refusing or guessing returns an error.
ast.target: 当未设置 `profile` 时必需。PARALLEL, SPECIALIST, ESCALATION 之一。拒绝或猜测将返回错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required when no `profile` is set. One concrete sentence explaining the chosen category. Examples: "PARALLEL: comparing 5 independent meeting notes" / "ESCALATION: edit_file failed twice, search_files cannot find the section". Generic phrases ("better context", "more thorough") are rejected.
ast.target: 当未设置 `profile` 时必需。一个具体的句子解释所选类别。示例：\"PARALLEL: 比较5个独立的会议记录\" / \"ESCALATION: edit_file失败两次，search_files找不到该部分\"。通用短语（\"更好的上下文\"，\"更彻底\"）将被拒绝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keyword(s) describing the capability you need, e.g. "pptx", "canvas", "diagram", "excel", "freshness". Case-insensitive substring match over tool names, labels, and descriptions.
ast.target: 描述所需能力的关键词，例如 \"pptx\", \"canvas\", \"diagram\", \"excel\", \"freshness\"。对工具名称、标签和描述进行不区分大小写的子字符串匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exact skill name as it appears in the SKILLS directory.
ast.target: SKILLS目录中显示的确切技能名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Obsidian command ID to execute (e.g., "daily-notes:open", "templater-obsidian:insert-template").

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if a disabled or previously installed Obsidian plugin could handle a capability the user needs. Use this when no active skill matches the request. Returns whether a matching plugin exists and its status.
ast.target: 检查已禁用或先前安装的Obsidian插件是否可以处理用户需要的功能。当没有活动技能匹配请求时使用此功能。返回是否存在匹配的插件及其状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short description of the needed capability (e.g., "kanban board", "dataview query", "calendar view").
ast.target: 所需功能的简短描述（例如，\"看板\", \"dataview查询\", \"日历视图\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional additional context about what the user is trying to do.
ast.target: 关于用户尝试做什么的可选附加上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable or disable an installed Obsidian community plugin. Use this when the user agrees to activate a disabled plugin that can help with their task. After enabling, wait briefly for commands to register, then use execute_command.
ast.target: 启用或禁用已安装的Obsidian社区插件。当用户同意激活可以帮助完成其任务的已禁用插件时使用此功能。启用后，等待命令注册，然后使用execute_command。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The plugin ID to enable or disable (e.g., "dbfolder", "obsidian-kanban", "dataview").
ast.target: 要启用或禁用的插件ID（例如，\"dbfolder\", \"obsidian-kanban\", \"dataview\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: true to enable the plugin, false to disable it. Defaults to true.
ast.target: true表示启用插件，false表示禁用插件。默认为true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder name of the self-authored skill that owns the script.
ast.target: 拥有该脚本的自创技能的文件夹名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File-name of the script inside scripts/, without the .js extension.
ast.target: scripts/目录中脚本的文件名，不带.js扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON-serializable arguments handed to the script's execute(args) function. Defaults to {}.
ast.target: 传递给脚本的execute(args)函数的JSON可序列化参数。默认为{}。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the sub-skill (folder name under data/skills/).
ast.target: 子技能的名称（data/skills/下的文件夹名称）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON-serializable inputs passed to the sub-skill. Inputs appear in the sub-skill's prompt under a "## Inputs" section.
ast.target: 传递给子技能的JSON可序列化输入。输入会出现在子技能提示的 \"## Inputs\" 部分下。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configured MCP server id (the name in the MCP settings).
ast.target: 已配置的MCP服务器ID（MCP设置中的名称）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the tool exposed by that MCP server.
ast.target: 该MCP服务器公开的工具名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON-serializable arguments passed to the MCP tool.
ast.target: 传递给MCP工具的JSON可序列化参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The API method name to call (e.g., "query", "search", "getPropertyValue").
ast.target: 要调用的API方法名称（例如，\"query\", \"search\", \"getPropertyValue\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arguments to pass to the method, in order. For example: ["TABLE file.name FROM #project"] for dataview.query.
ast.target: 按顺序传递给方法的参数。例如：对于dataview.query，[\"TABLE file.name FROM #project\"]。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parameters for the recipe. Keys are parameter names, values are strings. Example: { "input": "notes/report.md", "output": "exports/report.pdf" }
ast.target: 配方的参数。键是参数名称，值是字符串。示例：{ \"input\": \"notes/report.md\", \"output\": \"exports/report.pdf\" }

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dot-path of the setting to change (for action "set"), e.g. "autoApproval.noteEdits"
ast.target: 要更改的设置的点路径（用于操作 \"set\"），例如 \"autoApproval.noteEdits\"

ast.name: description
ast.source: New value for the setting (for action "set")

ast.name: description
ast.source: Settings tab to open (for action "open_tab"), e.g. "advanced", "providers", "agent-behaviour"
ast.target: 要打开的设置选项卡（用于操作 \"open_tab\"），例如 \"advanced\", \"providers\", \"agent-behaviour\"

ast.name: description
ast.source: Settings sub-tab to open (for action "open_tab"), e.g. "backup", "models", "permissions", "interface"
ast.target: 要打开的设置子选项卡（用于操作 \"open_tab\"），例如 \"backup\", \"models\", \"permissions\", \"interface\"

ast.name: description
ast.target: 模型标识符，例如 \"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\" 或 \"gemini-2.5-flash\"（用于操作 \"add\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Human-readable name shown in UI (optional for "add")
ast.target: 在UI中显示的人类可读名称（用于 \"add\" 时可选）

ast.name: description
ast.source: API key for the model (for action "add")
ast.target: 模型的 API 密钥（用于“添加”操作）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom base URL (for action "add", required for custom/azure providers)
ast.target: 自定义基础 URL（用于“添加”操作，自定义/Azure 提供商必需）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于“选择”和“测试”操作的模型键“名称|提供商”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Call a tool on a connected MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. Use this to access external tools and data sources configured in Settings → MCP.
ast.target: 调用已连接的 MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器上的工具。使用此功能可访问在“设置 → MCP”中配置的外部工具和数据源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the MCP server to call (as configured in Settings).
ast.target: 要调用的 MCP 服务器的名称（在设置中配置）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the tool to invoke on the server.
ast.target: 要在服务器上调用的工具名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arguments to pass to the tool. Must match the tool's input schema.
ast.target: 传递给工具的参数。必须符合工具的输入模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exact MCP server name as listed in the system prompt.
ast.target: 系统提示中列出的确切 MCP 服务器名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tool name on that server (without server prefix).
ast.target: 该服务器上的工具名称（不带服务器前缀）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the agent's own console logs (debug, warn, error) from the ring buffer. Useful for diagnosing issues, understanding errors, and self-debugging. Supports filtering by level, time, and pattern.
ast.target: 从环形缓冲区读取代理自身的控制台日志（调试、警告、错误）。用于诊断问题、理解错误和自我调试。支持按级别、时间和模式进行过滤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Action to perform. "query" (default) reads logs, "clear" empties the buffer.
ast.target: 要执行的操作。“查询”（默认）读取日志，“清除”清空缓冲区。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show logs since this time. Supports relative ("5m", "1h", "30s") or ISO timestamp.
ast.target: 显示此时间之后的日志。支持相对时间（“5m”、“1h”、“30s”）或 ISO 时间戳。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Search" provides full-text search across all vault notes.

Available commands:
- global-search:open -- Open the search pane

Use this skill only when the user explicitly wants to open the search UI. For programmatic searching, prefer the search_files or semantic_search tools.
ast.target:
插件“搜索”提供跨所有保险库笔记的全文搜索。

可用命令：
- global-search:open -- 打开搜索窗格

仅当用户明确想要打开搜索 UI 时才使用此技能。对于编程搜索，请优先使用 search_files 或 semantic_search 工具。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Quick Switcher" opens a fuzzy-search dialog to jump to any note.

Available commands:
- switcher:open -- Open the quick switcher dialog

Use this skill when the user wants to navigate to a specific note by name. For programmatic navigation, prefer the open_note tool.
ast.target:
插件“快速切换器”打开一个模糊搜索对话框，可跳转到任何笔记。

可用命令：
- switcher:open -- 打开快速切换器对话框

当用户想要通过名称导航到特定笔记时使用此技能。对于编程导航，请优先使用 open_note 工具。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Tags" shows a browsable list of all tags used across vault notes.

Available commands:
- tag-pane:open -- Open the tags pane in the sidebar

Use this skill when the user wants to browse or explore tags. For programmatic tag searching, prefer the search_by_tag tool.
ast.target:
插件“标签”显示保险库笔记中使用的所有标签的可浏览列表。

可用命令：
- tag-pane:open -- 在侧边栏中打开标签窗格

当用户想要浏览或探索标签时使用此技能。对于编程标签搜索，请优先使用 search_by_tag 工具。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Random Note" opens a randomly selected note.

Available commands:
- random-note:open -- Open a random note from the vault

Use this skill when the user wants to explore their vault randomly or asks for a surprise note.
ast.target:
插件“随机笔记”打开一个随机选择的笔记。

可用命令：
- random-note:open -- 从保险库中打开一个随机笔记

当用户想要随机探索他们的保险库或要求一个惊喜笔记时使用此技能。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Markdown" controls the note view mode.

Available commands:
- markdown:toggle-preview -- Toggle between editing mode and reading (preview) mode

Use this when the user wants to switch view modes. Also available as editor:toggle-source.
ast.target:
插件“Markdown”控制笔记视图模式。

可用命令：
- markdown:toggle-preview -- 在编辑模式和阅读（预览）模式之间切换

当用户想要切换视图模式时使用此功能。也可作为 editor:toggle-source 使用。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Graph View" visualizes connections between notes.

Available commands:
- graph:open -- Open the full vault graph view
- graph:open-local -- Open a local graph showing connections of the active note

Use this when the user wants to visualize note relationships or explore the knowledge graph.
ast.target:
插件“图形视图”可视化笔记之间的连接。

可用命令：
- graph:open -- 打开完整的保险库图形视图
- graph:open-local -- 打开显示活动笔记连接的局部图形

当用户想要可视化笔记关系或探索知识图谱时使用此功能。

ast.name: instructions
ast.source:
Plugin "Slides" turns notes into presentations.

Available commands:
- slides:start -- Start a slideshow presentation of the current note

Notes are split into slides by horizontal rules (---). Use this when the user wants to present a note as a slideshow.
ast.target:
插件“幻灯片”将笔记转换为演示文稿。

可用命令：
- slides:start -- 开始当前笔记的幻灯片演示

笔记通过水平规则（---）分割成幻灯片。当用户想要将笔记作为幻灯片演示时使用此功能。
